scripts.build:all: vp run zip:source && vp run build:firefox && vp run build:chrome
scripts.build:chrome:old: rm -rf dist && vp build && vp run zip:chrome
scripts.build:chrome:sushi: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-sushi.zip && MODE=sushi vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-sushi.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:atlas: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-atlas.zip && MODE=atlas vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-atlas.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:focus: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-focus.zip && MODE=focus vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-focus.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:popcorn: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-popcorn.zip && MODE=popcorn vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-popcorn.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:vex: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-vex.zip && MODE=vex vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-vex.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:chrry: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-chrry.zip && MODE=chrryAI vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-chrry.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:zarathustra: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-zarathustra.zip && MODE=zarathustra vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-zarathustra.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:search: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-search.zip && MODE=search vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-search.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:grape: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-grape.zip && MODE=grape vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-grape.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:burn: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-burn.zip && MODE=burn vp build && node scripts/validate-manifest-v3.js && zip -r dist-chrome-burn.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:vault: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-vault.zip && MODE=vault vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-vault.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:pear: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-pear.zip && MODE=pear vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-pear.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome:tribe: rm -rf dist dist-chrome-tribe.zip && MODE=tribe vp build && zip -r dist-chrome-tribe.zip dist -x 'dist/node_modules/**' 'dist/*/node_modules/**'
scripts.build:chrome: vp run build:chrome:sushi && vp run build:chrome:atlas && vp run build:chrome:focus && vp run build:chrome:vex && vp run build:chrome:popcorn && vp run build:chrome:chrry && vp run build:chrome:zarathustra && vp run build:chrome:search && vp run build:chrome:grape && vp run build:chrome:burn && vp run build:chrome:vault && vp run build:chrome:pear && vp run build:chrome:tribe
scripts.build:chrome:dev: rm -rf dist && tsc && vp build --mode development && vp run zip:chrome
scripts.build:dev: rm -rf dist && MODE=focus vp build --mode development
scripts.build:firefox: vp run zip:source && rm -rf dist && tsc && VITE_BROWSER=firefox vp build && vp run zip:firefox
scripts.reload:watch: chokidar "dist/**/*" -c "echo Extension updated - please refresh in Chrome"
